text.title: Prometheus Monitoring Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-existing-metrics
step.action: List top-cardinality metrics. Identify metrics with unbounded labels.

step.name: fix-naming-and-labels
step.action: Rename metrics to snake_case namespace_name_unit_suffix. Drop unbounded labels via metric_relabel_configs.

step.name: rewrite-alerts-to-symptoms
step.action: Convert cause-based alerts to symptom-based. Add runbook_url to every alert. Set for: duration (>=2m sev1, >=5m warning).
step.note: Gate: If any alert lacks runbook_url, STOP — write the runbook first.

step.name: add-recording-rules
step.action: Convert to recording rules with naming level:metric:operation. Commit to PrometheusRule.

step.name: validate-and-roll-out
step.action: Run validate-prometheus-monitoring.py against ServiceMonitor + PrometheusRule. Apply.
